title: Love-KANKEI Wall Shelves for Kitchen Rustic Wood Kitchen Organizer with Hooks, Floating Shelves with Wood Rail Grey
features: Versatile Kitchen Shelf with hooks: There comes with a wood rail for kitchen towel and 8 removeable metal hooks for organize. This kitchen spice rack will also be a stunning addition to your kitchen, organize your cooking utensils, mugs, pot and pan with hooks, spice and cans could be organized in wood board. This shelf also used as a paper towel holder when remove the hooks.

Easy Installation: Necessary perdurable hardware and instruction for assemble easily are included（with screws, hooks ）. Dimension of 44 × 18.5cm（17.3 × 7.3 inch）. Our wall shelf is made of paulownia wood. It is light but has strong bearing capacity, the total load of each wall shelf is 18kg（40 lbs）.

Bathroom Storage Wall Shelf: Wood storage shelves with a towel bar, it could be used in bathroom for towel without hooks and hold tissue, and the floating shelf can be store shampoo, body lotion, facial cleanser,shaving cream etc
Rustic Design Wall Shelf: Made of wood with torched finish and metal bracket, and The multi-purpose shelf is a great organizer for kitchen，bathroom，livingroom，bedroom and other home storage.
Perfect for Gift: As cute shelves, it's an ideal gift for family or friends.
